title: style_guide.json — the look (additively extensible via schema_version)
description: v1.1. The Art Director (Iris) ADDED render-detail fields under a bumped schema_version ('1.1'): `fps` and a global `textures`/overlay set. They are OPTIONAL (additive) so older artifacts and the offline stub producers — which stamp '1.0' and omit them — still validate; additionalProperties stays true so older readers never break.

signature_highlight.description: Atlas's one signature flourish — the #FFD000 highlighter beat.

fps.description: schema_version 1.1 (additive): base render frame rate. The Art Director sets it (default 30); a 12fps 'stutter' is a per-scene EFFECT, not this base rate.

textures.description: schema_version 1.1 (additive): the always-on, global hand-made overlay layer (paper, grain, halftone, …). Structure is fixed here; the allowed texture NAMES are grounded in the Art Director's vocabulary (value-level), refinable by the Composition Engineer without another schema bump.
